title: Day and Death Counter
description: This mod displays an in-game overlay that tracks days, deaths, and in-game time.
body:
# Counter Mod


![Counter Mod Show Case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf848e1a6072532b713556612a1a0dced4b14e83.gif)

This mod displays an in-game overlay that tracks **days, deaths, and in-game time**. It was designed primarily for Minecraft content creators who want to avoid manually editing these counters into their videos — especially for "100 Days" or Hardcore challenges.

I originally created this mod to save myself time editing my own gameplay videos, but quickly realized it could also help players who want better time awareness in solo adventures, long-term survival, or multiplayer series.

---

### **🛠️ Features**

* **Death Count:** The mod automatically tracks your deaths and now includes **automatic and manual sync options** to ensure your death count is always correct.
* **Flexible Placement:** Choose from **twelve total overlay positions** to perfectly integrate the counter into your screen layout.
* **Customization:** Fine-tune the counter's look using the **Scale Slider** to adjust its size, and use the **Offset Slider** for the Bottom-Center position to move it vertically, ensuring it doesn't conflict with other modpack UIs.
* **Visuals & Sound:** Includes one clean overlay style, basic icons, and random death sounds.

Whether you're a content creator or a player who likes visual feedback, this mod brings a simple and stylish way to track your journey.

---

🎁 A more complete and customizable version — featuring multiple overlay styles and icon themes — is currently available exclusively on my **Patreon** while the mod is still in development. Supporting the project helps me continue adding more styles and features.

🌟 This enhanced version will eventually be released for free in the future, once development is further along.
👉 [Support the mod on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Slard)
